narrative_beat: Cortina rubro-dourada pesada rasgada ao meio revelando luz dourada por tras

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a massive heavy crimson-and-gold theater curtain torn vertically down the middle, revealing blinding golden light behind the tear
subject.focal_point: the bright tear emitting smoke and embers outward
subject.secondary: Dense smoke clouds and floating orange embers emerge from the fissure. Foreground is heavy crimson velvet with gold trim.

composition.rule: vertical bilateral symmetry with central tear
composition.foreground: crimson curtain in rich velvet tones
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white empty stage behind the curtain

lighting.key_light: brilliant golden light emerging through the tear
lighting.rim_light: gold on curtain edges and tassels

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: veil torn to reveal what was hidden

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
